name: personalized-healthcare-platform-root
description: Root orchestrator for Personalized Healthcare and Wellness Platform

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run --prefix backend start" "npm run --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run --prefix backend dev" "npm run --prefix frontend dev"
scripts.prisma:push: npx prisma db push && npm run seed
